pageContext.name: Mighty Nein Portrait Series: The Hands of Fate
pageContext.description: How do you want to do this?   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Mighty Nein Portrait Series: The Hands of Fate Fine Art Print, a masterful new Critical Role art print by artist Sam Hogg.  Inspired by Art Nouveau portraiture, Sam Hogg captures the beauty, brilliance, and badassery of the heroes of Critical Role: Campaign 2 in this collectible art series. The Hands of Fate Fine Art Print embodies the driving forces of destiny behind the party's perilous adventures, celebrating the thrilling highs and lows of life in Wildemount. A mysterious cloaked figure holds the monogram of the Mighty Nein between two celestial hands while surrounded by icons representing each member of the team — their strengths, symbols, and stories bound together inseparably. A map of their travels is overlaid with tumbling dice, the ultimate deciders of fate.  Each Mighty Nein Portrait Series: The Hands of Fate Fine Art Print features an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the official Critical Role collection offered by Sideshow. Available both unframed and in a custom framed format, this fateful Critical Role collectible makes a mighty addition to any Critter's collection. Surround The Hands of Fate with all the members of the Mighty Nein Portrait Series — Beau, Fjord, Jester, Caduceus, Caleb, Veth, Yasha, and Mollymauk — to pay tribute to the greatest adventuring team this side of Exandria in your home.  Take a chance and roll the dice with the Mighty Nein Portrait Series: The Hands of Fate Fine Art Print by Sam Hogg today.
